items.title: Verstappen: No point racing in British GP if Red Bull can't fix top-speed issue
items.summary: Max Verstappen says there is "no point competing" in Sunday's British Grand Prix if his Red Bull team cannot fix an issue that limited his top speed during qualifying.

items.title: Rodman marks NWSL return with dramatic double
items.summary: Trinity Rodman scored two goals, including a stoppage-time winner, to lift the Washington Spirit to a 2-1 win over the Houston Dash on Friday..

items.title: Nagelsmann out as Germany boss, Klopp lined up
items.summary: Former Liverpool manager Jürgen Klopp said Friday he has had discussions with the German federation about taking over as national team coach after Julian Nagelsmann's exit.

items.title: Sources: France's Tchouaméni out vs. Paraguay
items.summary: Aurélien Tchouaméni, who left Friday's training with adductor pain, will miss France's World Cup round-of-16 match Saturday vs. Paraguay in Philadelphia, and he could also miss a potential quarterfinal on July 9 should France advance, sources told ESPN.

items.title: Sources: Mexico vs. England to KO six hours early
items.summary: Mexico's World Cup round-of-16 clash against England will kick off at 6 p.m. local time, as originally scheduled, in Mexico City on Sunday, sources have told ESPN, after lengthy talks between FIFA and the two national associations Friday.
